CREATE TABLE dates (id INT, event_date DATE);
SELECT id, event_date, quarter(event_date) AS quarter_number FROM dates;
SELECT DISTINCT quarter(event_date) FROM dates WHERE event_date >= DATE '1990-01-01';
SELECT event_date, quarter(event_date) AS quarter_number FROM (SELECT event_date FROM dates WHERE id = 1) AS subquery;
SELECT t1.id, quarter(t1.event_date) AS quarter_number FROM dates t1 JOIN (SELECT event_date FROM dates WHERE id = 2) AS t2 ON t1.event_date = t2.event_date;
CREATE TABLE years (year_id INT, year_val INT);
SELECT d.id, quarter(d.event_date) AS quarter_number, y.year_val FROM dates AS d JOIN years AS y ON quarter(d.event_date) = (y.year_val % 4) + 1;
SELECT MAX(quarter(event_date)) AS max_quarter FROM (SELECT event_date FROM dates) AS subquery;
SELECT event_date FROM dates ORDER BY quarter(event_date) ASC LIMIT 2;
CREATE TABLE events (event_name TEXT, event_date DATE);
INSERT INTO events VALUES ('Event 1', DATE '2022-05-15'), ('Event 2', DATE '2023-08-20');
SELECT e.event_name, quarter(e.event_date) AS quarter_number FROM events e WHERE quarter(e.event_date) = (SELECT MAX(quarter(event_date)) FROM dates);
SELECT id, event_date FROM dates WHERE event_date BETWEEN DATE '2020-01-01' AND DATE '2024-12-31' AND quarter(event_date) = 1;
